ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the seller */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the seller registered */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last active date of the seller */,
  "bank_account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number of the seller */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_routing_number" TEXT /* Bank routing number of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight_g" INTEGER /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "length_cm" INTEGER /* Length of the product in centimeters */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the product in centimeters */,
  "width_cm" INTEGER /* Width of the product in centimeters */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit of the product */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Current inventory quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "product_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for the item */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the item */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_type" INTEGER /* Type of payment (e.g., 0 for credit card, 1 for bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_value" REAL /* Value of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "installment_plan" TEXT /* Details of the installment plan */,
  "installment_amount" REAL /* Amount of each installment */,
  "installment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of installments */,
  "installment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the installment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the review belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Score given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was found helpful */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_type" TEXT /* Type of the photo (e.g., main, additional) */,
  "photo_caption" TEXT /* Caption of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_photos_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recency" (
  "recency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recency record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "recency_date" TEXT /* Date of the recency */,
  "recency_score" INTEGER /* Recency score of the customer */,
  "recency_rank" INTEGER /* Recency rank of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recency_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
